summary: Iteration 2 testing of WC2026 Pronostics MVP after adding the knockout phase (8 rounds: R32→Finale) and private leagues (create/join/leaderboard/leave). Rewrote the obsolete email/password test suite into pseudo+PIN; added knockout & league coverage. Backend: 25/25 pytest tests pass. Frontend: NavBar 'Ligues' link, /ligues page (create + join dialogs + copy code/link), KO Finale rendering on 2026-07-19, R32 on 2026-06-27, group-phase regression, dashboard and leaderboard all OK.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: import secrets done in the middle of the file (line 488) — minor style; consider hoisting to top imports.

server.py /leagues create_league: 'code' may be undefined if all 5 collision retries return existing codes (extremely unlikely with 32^6 space but technically possible). Consider raising 500 explicitly after exhausting retries.
fixtures.py knockout 'À déterminer' placeholders are fine but ensure home_code='' is filtered properly in StandingsDrawer (verified: standings not shown in KO sections).

Frontend Leagues.jsx: navigator.clipboard.writeText is not awaited and not wrapped in try/catch — on insecure contexts it can throw. Consider try/catch + fallback (document.execCommand or textarea trick).
Leagues.jsx fetchMyLeagues: no error toast on failure (silent in finally).

MatchRow / GroupSection: 'À déterminer' rows still render score inputs — predictions on knockout placeholder matches (with empty codes) are submitted to backend; backend accepts. Probably intended, but consider disabling input until home_code/away_code are non-empty to avoid pronos on placeholder teams.
Tests previously assumed email/password (legacy); now aligned with pseudo+PIN.
test_credentials: Test users created on-the-fly per run (TST<rand>/1234, TST<rand>/5678, OUT<rand>/9999, FETest1435/1357). Pre-existing user Zinedine/1986 is present but its current PIN in DB did not match — frontend test used a freshly registered user.
seed_data_creation: Frontend test created user FETest1435 (PIN 1357) and a league 'FE Test League'. Backend tests create transient users and a league that is auto-deleted via the owner-leave endpoint at the end of the suite.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL is https://predict-2026-world.preview.emergentagent.com (NOT the URL in the problem statement). Date tab testids are 'date-tab-YYYY-MM-DD' (not 'date-YYYY-MM-DD'). KO sections expose 'ko-section-{round}' (round in R32/R16/QF/SF/3RD/F). Group sections expose 'group-section-{group}-{matchday}'. League invite codes are 6 chars from alphabet ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789. Auth scheme = pseudo + PIN (4-6 digits). Admin token = wc2026-admin-secret-token via X-Admin-Token header. Knockout matches use home_team='À déterminer' and home_code='' (no flag rendered). 30 dates from 2026-06-11 to 2026-07-19. All 25 backend tests pass; all frontend critical flows pass.
rca of the issue: No bugs reproduced. Initial failing test was due to outdated email/password schema in previous iteration's test_backend.py; rewritten to use the current pseudo+PIN auth and to cover the two new features.
